channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: COMIC: How Excessive Heat Kills and How to Stay Safe
item.description: The human body has a natural cooling system, but it can only handle so much in high heat and humidity. Here’s the science behind heat-related deaths.

item.title: Pope Leo XIV’s Flight Home from Spain Was Grounded, So the King Came to His Aid
item.description: Leo’s Iberia charter, scheduled to return him to Rome after a week in Spain, was grounded Friday by a technical issue, prompting Spain’s king to assist.

item.title: Four key facts about the new FDA-approved sunscreen ingredient
item.description: The FDA approved a new sunscreen ingredient for the first time in two decades. It has been widely used in Europe for many years.

item.title: 'Cool Ladies Club' directed by 10 working-class women lives up to its name
item.description: Ten women from a working-class Indian community were given smartphones to make a documentary about their overlooked lives. The outcome is impressive.
